tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators

policies.refund: No refunds after 7 days of purchase.
policies.support: 24/7 support is available only on the Pro plan. Basic plan users get email support.
policies.cancellation: You can cancel your subscription anytime from your account settings.

faq.a: AutoStream supports YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and Twitter/X exports.

faq.q: Can I upgrade from Basic to Pro?
faq.a: Yes, you can upgrade anytime. You will be charged the pro-rated difference.
We do not offer a free trial currently, but we have a 7-day refund policy.
AI captions automatically generates subtitles for your videos using speech recognition.
